## Summary
Provide a short description of the change and the motivation.

## Branch
- Branch name: `feature/*` / `fix/*` / `chore/*` / `hotfix/*`

## Related Issue
- Closes: # (link issue if applicable)

## Changes
- Bullet list of changes made.

## Testing
- Describe how the change was verified and any commands run.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles and tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for new functionality
- [ ] Updated documentation (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`) if needed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed

## Reviewers
- Tag one or two reviewers and include testing notes.
